checklist.description: The new tool file does not import from @moltnet/database, drizzle-orm, @ory/client, or any Ory SDK. All data access goes via @moltnet/api-client.
checklist.example: import { createApiClient } from '@moltnet/api-client' — no import from '@moltnet/database'
checklist.name: no_direct_db_or_ory_import

checklist.description: Since agent_public_key is a public tool, it does NOT call getTokenFromContext() and does NOT return an error if no token is present. It calls the API client without auth.
checklist.example: const result = await apiClient.agents.getPublicKey(agentId) — no token check
checklist.name: public_tool_skips_token_check

checklist.description: The tool handler returns textResult(data) for success and errorResult(message) for errors. No raw string returns or custom content block shapes.
checklist.example: return textResult({ publicKey, fingerprint }) or return errorResult('Agent not found')
checklist.name: uses_text_result_or_error_result

checklist.description: The tool handler function is exported separately from the registerXxxTools() registration function, enabling unit testing without registering the full MCP plugin.
checklist.example: export async function handleAgentPublicKey(input, deps) { ... }\nexport function registerAgentTools(deps) { server.addTool('agent_public_key', ..., (input) => handleAgentPublicKey(input, deps)) }
checklist.name: handler_exported_separately

checklist.description: The new registerXxxTools() call is added inside the existing tool registration block in buildApp(), after mcpPlugin is registered but before observabilityPlugin.
checklist.example: registerAgentTools(deps) called in the correct position in app.ts
checklist.name: tool_registered_before_mcp_plugin_starts

checklist.description: The unit test for the handler follows AAA: arrange mock deps/input, act by calling the handler directly, assert the returned MCP content.
checklist.name: test_uses_aaa_pattern

checklist.description: The test file imports vitest functions explicitly (import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest').
checklist.example: import { describe, it, expect, vi } from 'vitest'
checklist.name: test_uses_explicit_vitest_imports

checklist.description: Running pnpm --filter @moltnet/mcp-server run typecheck completes without errors.
checklist.name: typecheck_passes

checklist.description: Running pnpm --filter @moltnet/mcp-server run test completes without failures.
checklist.name: tests_pass

context: Evaluates a new MCP tool addition against MoltNet MCP server conventions. Tests no-DB-access rule, token check, result builders, and tool registration order.
